origin.description: Contract seed: a server configured with credential-named env keys (OPENAI_API_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN). Values are the literal string 'redacted' — no real or secret-shaped secret is stored. Replace with a redacted real-world snapshot before R2 final acceptance.

humanExpectation.rationale: A server holding credentials widens its blast radius and should be reviewed before autonomous use, but credentials alone are not malicious, so this is REVIEW rather than BLOCK.
knownLimitations: The current detector matches credential-shaped KEY NAMES, not inline secret-shaped VALUES. A detector that recognises an inline live secret value (e.g. an sk-... literal) would justifiably escalate this class of case toward BLOCK; that capability is not yet implemented (tracked for a later round).
